description_long: This object is a vintage-style briefcase with a rounded, domed lid and a sturdy rectangular base. The exterior is primarily constructed from dark, polished wood, accented with blackened metal bands and rivets along the edges for reinforcement. The front features a central metal lock plate, while the back displays two visible hinges, suggesting the lid can be opened. Both sides are equipped with a chain-link handle attached to metal brackets, providing a secure grip for carrying. The overall design is reminiscent of a treasure chest, with a robust and slightly weathered appearance. No external pockets or brand logos are visible, and the corners are reinforced with metal for added durability.
description: A vintage, domed wooden briefcase with black metal bands, chain handles on each side, and a central front lock plate. The design is robust, with reinforced corners and a polished, slightly weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed wooden lid, central metal lock plate, and black metal bands with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile, chain-link handle, and metal-reinforced edges.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the domed lid, two visible metal hinges, and continuous metal banding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another chain-link handle and reinforced metal edges.
attribute_handle_type: Two side-mounted, chain-link handles made of metal, attached with metal brackets; flexible and fixed in place.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Central front-mounted key lock plate, made of metal, with no visible combination or electronic features.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Blackened metal corner reinforcements, rounded and riveted, covering all corners for protection.
